summary: Closed parent only after all eight dispatch-wave child beads were already closed, focused canonical CLI tests passed, stale TODO wording was removed from the parent surfaces, and repository checks remained clean.

child_beads.evidence: close_reason cites commit e2bccdcf41a40fcc6efe6996b037858f10f14fd8 and 15/15 PASS
close_reason records doctor/health/repair/validate/audit/why bound to the real decision ledger with focused surface tests
close_reason cites commit a3bad66 and 15/15 PASS

fresh_validation.command: for t in tests/build-dispatch-packet-canonical-cli.sh tests/dispatch-and-log-canonical-cli.sh tests/dispatch-author-contract-probe-canonical-cli.sh tests/dispatch-canonical-cli-validator-canonical-cli.sh tests/dispatch-deferral-lint-canonical-cli.sh tests/dispatch-delivery-verify-canonical-cli.sh tests/dispatch-log-backfill-v2-canonical-cli.sh tests/dispatch-log-v2-violations-doctor-canonical-cli.sh; do bash "$t"; done
bash -n on all eight dispatch-wave scripts
rg stale scaffold TODO wording across eight scripts and eight tests
fresh_validation.note: no matches for TODO markers, TODO: define subjects, TODO: id semantics, or canonical-cli stubs preserved

value_add: Keeps the parent bead from lingering after the eight concrete child surfaces already shipped.
Aligns operator-facing script/test text with the implemented state so future agents do not treat stale scaffold wording as live work.
Preserves the launch branch invariant that PR #3 remains clean and unrelated canonical/template dirty files are untouched.
not_claimed: This does not claim every dispatch ecosystem issue is solved.
This does not touch the separate team-pulse-heartbeat scaffold regression observed during triage.
This does not close upstream tracker flywheel-ei5fp or long-running parent flywheel-oxzyr.
